title: hieracium mougeotii subsp. conocerinthe
intro: Hieracium mougeotii subsp. conocerninthe, also known as Hieracium conocerninthe, is a plant species in the dandelion family, characterized by its distinctive leaves and yellow flowers. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium conocerninthe include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Hieracium conocerninthe is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, with the leaves and flowers being used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
